About Us

WHO WE ARE

A COREN-certified Nigerian construction and engineering company committed to building Nigeria's future — one project at a time since 2012.

FE
Lagos, Nigeria · Est. 2012
Our Story

BUILT ON EXCELLENCE
& INTEGRITY

Incorporated in 2012, Field Explorer Limited is a duly licensed and registered Nigerian construction and engineering company under the Companies and Allied Matters Act.

We provide end-to-end solutions in building construction, architectural and structural design, project management, procurement, and consultancy — serving clients across residential, commercial, industrial, and public sectors.

With a proven track record of delivering projects on schedule and to specification, Field Explorer continues to play a significant role in advancing Nigeria's infrastructure development while maintaining a strong commitment to sustainability and innovation.

Start a Project
V
Vision Statement
"To be a standout Building Construction Company in Nigeria with quality standards."
M
Mission Statement
"To be a one-stop solution construction company that gives customer satisfaction and contributes to the growth of infrastructure development."
What Drives Us

OUR CORE VALUES

🏆
Quality
ISO 9001:2015 standards form the backbone of every project we undertake. We never cut corners.
⚡
Excellence
We don't just meet expectations — we consistently exceed them through skilled execution.
🛡️
Integrity
Transparent, honest relationships with every client, partner, and team member.
🤝
Teamwork
We uphold teamwork in an exciting, friendly, and conducive environment where everyone thrives.
🏆
QUALITY POLICY

At Field Explorer Limited, we are committed to providing outstanding services — Construction, Engineering, Property Maintenance, Architecture & Project Management — that adhere to ISO 9001:2015 standards and exceed the expectations of our valued customers. Continual improvement and the effectiveness of our quality management system are at the heart of our operations.

🦺
HEALTH, SAFETY & ENVIRONMENT

Field Explorer Limited places the utmost importance on the safety of our personnel and all those impacted by our operations. We pledge to comply with all local Health, Safety, and Environmental Protection regulations in every location we work. Our personnel are informed about relevant legislation and we provide continuous training to keep them well-equipped and safe.

READY TO BUILD
WITH US?

Talk to our team — we deliver from concept to completion.
